_comment: Copy this file to ./config.json (gitignored) and edit to your taste.

redaction._comment: Set real_username to the part of your home path to replace. Auto-detected from $USER if empty.

_schedule_comment: Controls when wiki-build and wiki-lint run. Values: on-sync (after every sync), daily, weekly, manual, never.
_vault_comment: Default vault path for --vault flag. Set to your Obsidian/Logseq vault. Empty = must pass --vault explicitly.
_graph_comment: Default graph engine. builtin = stdlib wikilink graph (zero deps). graphify = AI-powered (requires pip install llmwiki[graph]).
_adapters_comment: Contrib adapters. All disabled by default — enable with: llmwiki sync --adapter <name>
_synthesis_comment: LLM backend for auto-synthesizing wiki source pages. backend=dummy (default, offline) | ollama (local HTTP). Run `llmwiki synthesize --check` to probe the server.
